title: cleome erosa subsp. erosa
intro: Cleome erosa subsp. erosa, also known as the 'Pink Trumpet Flower', is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cleomaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating skin conditions and wounds, as it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cleome erosa subsp. erosa include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
